name: Indonesian Gado-Gado
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook all of the vegetables lightly but separately.
2. Drain and arrange in layers on a serving platter.
3. Set aside until cold.
1. Heat the oil in a small saucepan.
2. Add the garlic and chilis and stir-fry for 3 minutes.
3. Stir in the blachan, laos, and sugar and cook until they have dissolved.
4. Stir in the peanut butter and coconut milk and blend thoroughly.
5. Bring to the boil.
6. Remove from the heat and stir in the lemon juice or vinegar.
1. Pour the sauce over the top of the vegetables.
2. Garnish with the crackers and chopped scallions.
Preparation and Cooking Time: 40 minutes
Makes: 6 servings
